name: Windsor Athletic Club
about: Windsor Athletic Club is a locally-owned, full-service fitness and recreation facility in Windsor, WI, featuring an indoor golf simulator alongside a wide range of amenities. The club operates as a multi-sport venue with a focus on accessible year-round fitness, offering services from personal training and group classes to competitive leagues and youth sports. The golf simulator is presented as one of the club's many features, available to members with a potential discount for those who opt into longer-term commitments.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient indoor access for year-round practice, unaffected by weather
Integration with a larger fitness facility offering diverse training options
Potential for discounted rates with a 2-year membership
Casual and welcoming atmosphere accessible to members of the community

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service or a kitchen on-site.
No mention of a bar or alcohol service.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is assumed you would need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of a kitchen or bar service, indicating outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Windsor Athletic Club offers on-site childcare services, making it a kid-friendly environment.
